title: Long READ block (Typewriter theme) — parked at final phase, footer-clear check

readBlocks.content:
Jesus recreates the same scenario as when Peter was first called by the shore.

He tells Peter: even though you denied me three times, I forgive you, and the calling on your life is not forfeit.

The restoration is complete and personal, asked three times to match the three denials that still weighed on Peter's heart.

Follow me, He says again, exactly as He had said at the very beginning of it all.

★ END — this final themed line must be fully visible ABOVE the bottom navigation. If it is cut off or hidden behind the controls, the theme footer is covering the text. ★
